works.filename: Concept 4.jpg
works.title: Unlocked: Entrepreneur Coach
works.description: Lock-screen mockup stacking aspirational iOS-style notifications — closed deal, team kudos, vacation booked — before the product reveal. Social proof as the entire creative.

works.filename: JOS2 - Bundle - V3 - M.jpg
works.title: Kiierr — Final Sale: 20% Off
works.description: Premium-feel promo for Kiierr's DHT-blocking shampoo + conditioner duo. Dark composition with natural ingredient cues (ginseng, cinnamon, ginkgo) and a 4.8★ social-proof bar anchoring the offer.

works.filename: JOS3 - Deal for me - V1 - M.jpg
works.title: Kiierr — Why Should I Care For My Hairline?
works.description: Question-led top-of-funnel creative on soft blush. Bold "BUY 2 → Get 64% Off" math directs attention to the bundle without shouting.

works.filename: JOS7 - Postpartum Hair Loss - V1 - F.jpg
works.title: Kiierr Laser Cap — I Need This Immediately
works.description: UGC-style iMessage mock pairing a postpartum before/after with a peer-to-peer text thread. 7-month money-back seal pins the offer at the bottom.

works.filename: JOS8 - Hair Growth Progression - V3 - M.png
works.title: Illumiflow — Your Hair's Second Chance
works.description: Month-by-month progression ad for Illumiflow's DHT-blocking shampoo. Emotional micro-copy ("Drain stopped scaring me") carries the journey from fear to confidence, closed with a verified-buyer quote.

works.filename: Static 1a.jpg
works.title: Tennis Prints — Effortless From Order To Wall
works.description: Review-driven ad for a tennis stadium art print brand. Three stacked testimonials with heart icons lean on social proof next to a Wimbledon watercolor hero.

works.filename: Static 1c.jpg
works.title: Yemayá Sea Moss Gel — Pineapple
works.description: Benefit-stacked ad for Yemayá's pineapple sea moss gel. Dark wood backdrop keeps the pouch front-and-center while five right-side benefit cards read top-down on mobile.

works.filename: Static 2 - V3.jpg
works.title: Slippery Kitty — Your Kitty Deserves Better
works.description: Problem-first ad for Kitty Queen. Two peaches — shriveled vs. ripe — carry the before/after concept wordlessly, with the product bridging them.

works.filename: Static 2 - V3 2.jpg
works.title: Slippery Kitty — Confidence Back
works.description: Hero ad for Kitty Queen's feminine probiotic gummies. Warm staging with florals, lavender, and rose quartz reframes an intimate wellness product as unapologetic self-care.

works.filename: Static 2a.jpg
works.title: Yemayá Sea Moss Gel — Gut Health Daily Boost
works.description: Clean supplement-fact layout for Yemayá's strawberry jar. Red accents and custom gut icons let it read like a label, not an ad.

works.filename: Static 2a 2.jpg
works.title: LifeVac — Don't Wish You Had One
works.description: Safety-product ad using a tense real-use photo and a five-star reassurance quote to sell peace of mind — not alarm.

works.filename: Static 2c.jpg
works.title: Tennis Prints — Bring The Court They Love To Their Wall
works.description: Gifting-angle ad with a soft-lit lifestyle hero and a green checklist — Legendary Courts, Historic & Modern Venues, Ideal Décor — pitching both product and occasion.

works.filename: Static 3 - V3.jpg
works.title: Slippery Kitty — Sex Like You're 25 Again
works.description: Four peach halves shift week-by-week from dry and shriveled to ripe and glistening. The entire product claim is carried by the composition, then closed by a verified-buyer quote.

works.filename: Static 3c.jpg
works.title: Yemayá Mango Sea Moss Gel — For Vibrant Hair
works.description: Beach-side hero repositioning sea moss gel as hair care. White copy block and coral "100% Natural" CTA chip anchor the tropical setting.

works.filename: Static 3c 2.jpg
works.title: Yemayá Mango Sea Moss Gel — Hair Variant
works.description: Paired variant of the beach-side hair-care ad, kept for client A/B testing across placements.

works.filename: Static 4 - V1.jpg
works.title: Slippery Kitty — Valentine's Day Sale
works.description: BOGO Valentine's ad for Kitty Queen. Rose gold staging, pineapple and florals, "Feel Like Yourself Again" 4.8★ bar at the foot of the frame.

works.filename: Static 5 - V3.jpg
works.title: Slippery Kitty — Don't Let Discomfort Ruin Valentine's
works.description: Vertical seasonal creative. Satin and florals frame the product while a 90-day money-back guarantee de-risks the BOGO offer.

works.filename: Static 6 - V1.jpg
works.title: Slippery Kitty — You're Not A Bad Wife
works.description: Empathy-first creative for menopausal intimacy. A ragdoll character holding the product softens a hard emotional hook; 400K+ reviews and a 30-day guarantee de-risk the click.

works.filename: Static Ad 24  - B2C - Hip Pain Benefits Layout - Hook 3.jpg
works.title: Ketro — Can't Walk Without Your Hip Locking Up?
works.description: Benefit-layout ad for Ketro's CALM magnesium cream. Six symmetrical icons — pain relief, joint recovery, calm discomfort, reduced inflammation, sleep support, improved mobility — orbit the tube.

works.filename: Static Ad 25 - B2C - Nerve Relief in a Cream - Hook 2.jpg
works.title: Ketro — Nerve Relief In A Cream
works.description: Hook-2 variant positioning Ketro's magnesium cream as a drug-free alternative for nerve pain. Minimal type, product-forward composition.

works.filename: Static Ad 26 - B2C - Relief for Pins & Needles - Hook 1.jpg
works.title: Ketro — Relief For Pins & Needles
works.description: Hook-1 variant targeting the pins-and-needles audience. Clean, direct product shot with benefit headline — built for scroll-stop at small sizes.

works.filename: Static Ad 30 - B2C - Hip Pain? Back Pain? Multi-Pain Callout Hook 3.png
works.title: Ketro — Where Does It Hurt? Rub Ketro There.
works.description: Multi-pain callout ad using a body-map illustration with glowing red pressure points. The headline doubles as permission to use the product anywhere.

works.filename: Static Ad 32 - B2C - Years of Nerve Discomfort — Gone - V2.jpg
works.title: Ketro — Years Of Nerve Discomfort, Gone
works.description: Transformation hook with a hard-benefit headline. Version 2 of a tested layout — used to attack a chronic-pain audience segment.

works.filename: Static Ad 33 - B2C - Burning Pain_ Gone. - V2.jpg
works.title: Ketro — Burning Pain? Gone.
works.description: Two-beat headline treatment — problem / resolution — paired with a hero product shot. Built for mid-funnel retargeting.

works.filename: Static Ad 34 - Foot Pain Relief - V2.png
works.title: Ketro — Foot Pain Relief
works.description: Foot-specific angle for Ketro's magnesium cream. Narrower audience cut engineered to beat the broader pain-relief variants.

works.filename: Static Ad 35 - Numbness_Tingling Stopped - V1.png
works.title: Ketro — The Tingling Stopped After This
works.description: X-ray style hand visual pairs the jar with anatomical pain points. Trust stamps — fast-absorbing, no greasy residue, 5-star reviews, 30-day guarantee — close the frame.

works.filename: Static Ad 37 - Nerve Relief in a Gel - V2.png
works.title: Ketro — Nerve Relief In A Gel
works.description: Format-swap variant: the same hook reframed around the gel texture cue. Tests whether texture-language outperforms cream-language.

works.filename: Static Ad 38 - Relief for Pins & Needles - V3.jpg
works.title: Ketro — Relief For Pins & Needles, V3
works.description: Third iteration on the pins-and-needles hook. Layout sharpened for feed — same hero, tighter type hierarchy.

works.filename: Static Ad 39 - Ditch the “Zombie” Pills - V3.jpg
works.title: Ketro — Ditch The "Zombie" Pills
works.description: Split-frame ad: crossed-out pills on one side, Ketro + smeared product on the other. Yellow chips flag side effects, drowsiness, brain fog — every objection the creative exists to resolve.

works.filename: Static Ad 40 - Your Feet Aren’t Broken. They’re Starving - V1.jpg
works.title: Ketro — Your Feet Aren't Broken. They're Starving.
works.description: Reframe hook — positions foot pain as a magnesium deficiency, not a malfunction. The headline does almost all the work.

works.filename: Static Ad 41 - Hip Pain_ Back Pain_ Multi-Pain Callout - V1.jpg
works.title: Ketro — Hip Pain? Back Pain? Multi-Pain Callout
works.description: V1 of the multi-pain callout. Tests whether the broadest possible pain audience can be captured in a single creative.

works.filename: Static Ad 42 - Years of Pain — Gone in Days - V1.jpg
works.title: Ketro — Years Of Pain, Gone In Days
works.description: Time-collapse hook — trades the audience's timeline of suffering against a speed-of-relief promise. Built for high-intent prospecting.

works.filename: Static Ad 43- The Recovery Flow - V1.jpg
works.title: Ketro — The Recovery Flow
works.description: Mechanism-of-action ad. Muscle Relaxation → Reduced Inflammation → Pain-Free Movement, paired with three floating Ketro jars. Teaches the product without selling it.
